subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thou hast ever been, and art still, remembered in this sacred court. Be thou assured, for in service to His Excellency [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله همیشه در این ساحت مذکور بوده و هستی مطمئن باش زیرا بخدمت جناب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @poems and quotation from poetry, @praise and encouragement
